subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the holy fragrances wafted from the Kingdom of Abhá! Thou hast chanted the verses of thanksgiving unto God for that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس المنتشره من ملکوت الابهی قد رتلت ایات الشکر لله لما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
